infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Cerlita Chat needs access to your camera to send photos and videos to your chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Cerlita Chat needs access to your photos to share them in chats.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Cerlita Chat needs to save shared media to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Cerlita Chat needs access to your microphone to record audio messages and make calls.

plugins.photosPermission: Cerlita Chat needs access to your photos to share them in chats.
plugins.cameraPermission: Cerlita Chat needs access to your camera to send photos and videos.

plugins.microphonePermission: Cerlita Chat needs access to your microphone to record audio messages and make calls.

plugins.photosPermission: Cerlita Chat needs access to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Cerlita Chat needs to save media to your library.
